title: [phase:plan] [family:approval-tokens] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Review the new prototype and propose the minimum scoped approval-token model to replace coarse --approve. Return concise bullets: token fields, validation rules, TTL, and how to bind token to action+...
summary_text: - **Minimal doc set to update:** - `AGENTS.md` (canonical policy source; add the hard pre-implementation gate rule). - `CODEX.md` (Codex runtime behavior; mirror the same MUST/violation language). - `rules/shared-orchestration-playbook.md` (operational gate sequence and stop behavior). - `.codex/prompts/kernel.md` and `.codex/prompts/k.md` (enforce `/kernel` prompt contract at execution time). - `README.md` (short operator-facing summary to prevent policy drift). - **Key wording shape (copy pattern):** - “Before any implementation activity, the following gates MUST be completed: `Requirements Definition`, `Simulation`, `Critical Review`, `Correction`.” - “Starting implementation before all gates pass is a `policy violation`.” - “On violation, execution MUST stop and return to `phase:repair`/`phase:replan` until gates are satisfied.” - “Gate completion MUST be evidenced in pre-implementation artifacts (plan/simulation/critic/correction records), not implied from chat intent.”
